steps.title: Extract two points from the table
steps.content: From the table, we have the points $(-6, n+184)$, $(-3, n+92)$, and $(0, n)$. Since this is a linear relationship, any two points will give the same slope. We'll use the first two.

steps.title: Apply the slope formula
steps.content:
Use the slope formula $m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1}$ with points $(-6, n+184)$ and $(-3, n+92)$: $$m = \frac{(n+92) - (n+184)}{-3 - (-6)} = \frac{n + 92 - n - 184}{-3 + 6} = \frac{-92}{3} = -\frac{92}{3}$$ The constant $n$ cancels immediately, leaving only the numerical values.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
